title: EmbedCardData
description: Lazy media-embed payload (YouTube / Vimeo / generic player URL).

provider.description: Media provider. 'generic' frames `url` directly (must be an https embeddable player URL whose origin is app-allowlisted).

id.description: Provider video id (required for youtube/vimeo when `url` is absent). e.g. 'dQw4w9WgXcQ'.

url.description: Full media/watch URL. For youtube/vimeo it is parsed to an id; for 'generic' it is the embeddable player src (https only).

title.description: Accessible title for the player iframe + the poster label. Strongly recommended for a11y.

poster.description: Thumbnail shown before play. When omitted, youtube/vimeo derive a default thumbnail; 'generic' shows a neutral play placeholder.
